specific_change.target: Right-size compute from m5.2xlarge × 12 to m5.large × 8. Right-size database from db.r6g.4xlarge to db.r6g.xlarge. Leave the 2 read replicas and PrivateLink network configuration unchanged.
specific_change.produced: Right-size compute from m5.2xlarge × 12 to m5.large × 8 (reducing from 96 vCPUs / 384 GiB to 16 vCPUs / 64 GiB total) and downsize the database primary and replicas from db.r6g.4xlarge to db.r6g.xlarg
